title: [FIRRTL] (validif) mismatch
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    input inp_o: SInt<6>
    output tmp11: SInt<6>
    tmp11 <= validif(UInt<1>(0), inp_o)
```

Compiled with `firtool` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  input  [5:0] inp_o,
  output [5:0] tmp11);

  assign tmp11 = 6'h0;	// a_top_mod.fir:2:3, :5:14
endmodule
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  input  [5:0] inp_o,
  output [5:0] tmp11
);
  assign tmp11 = inp_o;
endmodule
```

`Yosys 0.9+3911 (git sha1 4b31223e, clang 11.0.1 -fPIC -Os)` reports formal mismatch:

```
ERROR: Found 6 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'
```
